messages.name: Give a software job referral to KCC dev! USA, 2+ YOE, Computer Science B.S. - LinkedIn
All KCC options explained/quick tutorial - YouTube
WARNING: Kindle update 5.19.2 may add huge margins to MOBI/EPUB - YouTube
Staying logged out+restart fixes problem, but deletes all data. Discuss on Discord.
You can also make a new Amazon account and then immediately activate airplane mode.
To avoid updates, use airplane mode and delete any partial update files on device root.
WORKAROUND: Convert to PDF PNG 200 MB and upload to amazon.com/sendtokindle
PDF may not work on 11th gen
